sharp.name: Sharp
sharp.description: Increases damage on this card by {Amount}.

swift.name: Swift
swift.description: The first time you play this card, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}.

instinct.name: Instinct
instinct.description: Decrease the cost of this card by 1.

perfect fit.name: Perfect Fit
perfect fit.description: Whenever this would be shuffled into your Draw Pile, place it on the top instead.

glam.name: Glam
glam.description: This card has Replay once per combat.

imbued.name: Imbued
imbued.description: This card is played automatically at the start of each combat.

sown.name: Sown
sown.description: The first time you play this card each combat, gain {Amount:energyIcons()}.

momentum.name: Momentum
momentum.description: Increase this card's attack damage by {Amount} this combat when played.

vigorous.name: Vigorous
vigorous.description: The first time this card is played, it deals {Amount} additional damage.

corrupted.name: Corrupted
corrupted.description: Deal 50% more damage, but lose 2 HP.

favored.name: Favored
favored.description: This card's attack damage is doubled.

goopy.name: Goopy
goopy.description: This card gains Exhaust. When played, permanently increase this card's Block by 1.

slither.name: Slither
slither.description: When you draw this card, randomize its cost from 0 to 3.

slumbering essence.name: Slumbering Essence
slumbering essence.description: If this card is in your hand at the end of turn, reduce its cost by 1 until it is played.

clone.name: Clone
clone.description: This card can be duplicated at Rest Sites.

royally approved.name: Royally Approved
royally approved.description: This card has Innate and Retain.
